windows.title: Welcome
windows.content:
# Welcome to Win95 Desktop

This is a **retro-styled** desktop app.

## Features
- Three resizable columns
- Text/Markdown windows
- Stock ticker windows
- Drag to resize windows
- Published layout via `layout.json`

## How to use
Click **+ Add Window** at the bottom of any column to add a new window.

Try editing this text — it saves automatically to your browser.

Use **Start → Export for GitHub** to download changes for commit.

```
Code blocks work too
```

> Blockquotes look great
